title: Magnetic Field
description: Why field lines are misleading—and what a magnetic field actually is.

sections.title: What You've Been Told
sections.content: Magnetic fields are shown as lines going from North to South.

sections.title: Better Model
sections.content: A magnetic field determines how moving charges experience forces. It only affects charges in motion, and the force depends on both velocity and field orientation.

sections.title: Key Insight
sections.content: Magnetism is a relativistic effect of electric fields. Changing perspectives explain why it appears as a separate force.
